title: March Madness Scores: No. 1 Seeds Duke, Michigan Dominate, Texas A&M Stunned Early
body:
As the 2024 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament continues to heat up, several top seeds have made their mark in the second round, but not without a few surprises. The road to the Sweet 16 has been paved with thrilling upsets and nail-biting finishes, leaving fans on the edge of their seats. In the midst of the action, two of the top seeds, Duke and Michigan, have emerged victorious, but not without facing stiff challenges from lower-ranked opponents.

Duke, the top-ranked team in the country, had a close call against No. 9 TCU, but ultimately pulled away with an 81-58 win. The Blue Devils had to dig deep to overcome the Horned Frogs' relentless defense and find their rhythm on offense. Duke's experience and depth eventually paid off, as they outscored TCU by 23 points in the second half to secure their spot in the Sweet 16. This win marks a significant milestone for Duke, as it solidifies their position as one of the top contenders for the national championship.

Michigan, another top seed, also had a tough test against No. 9 seed Iowa State. The Wolverines trailed by as many as 12 points in the first half, but made a dramatic comeback to win 67-64. Michigan's resilience and determination were on full display as they fought back from the brink of defeat to secure the victory. The Wolverines' win marks a crucial moment in their tournament run, as they look to make a deep push for the national title.

In contrast, No. 3 seed Texas A&M suffered a disappointing loss to No. 7 seed West Virginia. The Aggies were expected to advance easily, but were stunned by the Mountaineers' tenacious defense and timely three-point shooting. Texas A&M's loss serves as a wake-up call for the team, highlighting the need for improvement in their defense and rebounding. The Aggies will look to regroup and refocus as they head into the next round.

The second round of the NCAA Tournament has provided a thrilling mix of upsets and dominant performances, showcasing the depth and talent of this year's field. As the Sweet 16 teams are finalized, fans can expect even more intense competition and dramatic finishes. The road to the Final Four will be paved with challenging matches and unexpected twists, but one thing is certain – only the strongest teams will remain.

As the tournament enters its next phase, the focus will shift to the Sweet 16 teams, where the stakes will be higher and the competition will be fiercer. With several top seeds already eliminated, the door is open for lower-ranked teams to make a statement and advance further in the tournament. The next few days will be a rollercoaster ride of emotions, with fans eagerly awaiting the outcomes of each match. One thing is certain – the 2024 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament will go down in history as an unforgettable ride.
